# Openletz

> Openletz is a Luxembourg AI agency. We build AI agents, chatbots and automations for businesses, plus the websites and shops around them. When a project needs blockchain, we build that too. Everything is hosted in Europe.

Openletz is the studio name of Commit Media S.à r.l. (RCS Luxembourg B276192), run by Clément Fermaud in Luxembourg. He also runs marketing for Aleph Cloud. We pick AI tools with GDPR and the EU AI Act in mind.

Primary domain: https://openletz.ai
Languages: English (primary), French, German, Luxembourgish.

## What we do

- AI agents & automation (our core): assistants, chatbots and automations — in French, English, German or Luxembourgish. A quick audit, a working prototype, then live in production.
- Digital & growth: fast websites and e-commerce on Next.js, SEO and answer-engine optimization, content and analytics.
- Web3 & on-chain (when it helps): smart contracts, token-gating and on-chain apps, hosted in Europe.

## Pricing

Every project gets a fixed quote up front; rates on request. Based in Luxembourg, your project may be co-funded through the SME Package — we help with the paperwork.

## Work

- Vins Fins (https://www.vinsfins.lu): multilingual wine shop & restaurant e-commerce (Next.js, Stripe).
- La Grocerie (https://www.lagrocerie.lu): farm-to-table grocery & natural-wine e-commerce.
- Gategram (https://gategram.app): our product — sell digital content on Telegram, paid in Stars.
- LiberClaw (https://liberclaw.ai): a personal AI assistant you control.
- Ophis (https://ophis.fi): an intent-based DEX aggregator.
- Skills.ws (https://www.skills.ws): our product — a marketplace of skills for AI coding assistants.

## Contact

- Entity: Commit Media S.à r.l. · RCS Luxembourg B276192 · Luxembourg
- Founder: Clément Fermaud

- Full reference: https://openletz.ai/llms-full.txt
